ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "date_modeled" TEXT /* Date the poll was modeled */,
  "date_start" TEXT /* Start date of the poll */,
  "date_end" TEXT /* End date of the poll */,
  "poll_subject" TEXT /* Subject of the poll */,
  "pollster" TEXT /* Pollster conducting the poll */,
  "poll_grade" TEXT /* Grade of the poll */,
  "poll_type" TEXT /* Type of the poll */,
  "poll_weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the poll */,
  "poll_influence" REAL /* Influence of the poll */,
  "poll_multi_version" TEXT /* Indicates if the poll has multiple versions */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population segment polled */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the poll */,
  "pct_approve" REAL /* Percentage of approval */,
  "pct_disapprove" REAL /* Percentage of disapproval */,
  "pct_approve_adjusted" REAL /* Adjusted percentage of approval */,
  "pct_disapprove_adjusted" REAL /* Adjusted percentage of disapproval */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the poll data was recorded */,
  "poll_url" TEXT /* URL to the poll's detailed information */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the polling methodology used */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* The margin of error for the poll */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* The confidence level for the poll results */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the poll */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the poll */,
  "geography" TEXT /* The geographical area where the poll was conducted */,
  "language" TEXT /* The language in which the poll was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_pollster FOREIGN KEY ("pollster") REFERENCES pollsters ("pollster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_poll_subject FOREIGN KEY ("poll_subject") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_poll_type FOREIGN KEY ("poll_type") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_population FOREIGN KEY ("population") REFERENCES populations ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_poll_grade FOREIGN KEY ("poll_grade") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_party FOREIGN KEY ("party") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollsters" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster */,
  "pollster_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollster */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the pollster */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the pollster */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the pollster */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the pollster was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* The headquarters location of the pollster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population segment */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* Name of the population segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the population segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the poll */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user when accessing the poll */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment */,
  "adjustment_value" REAL /* Value of the adjustment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who made the adjustment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the adjustment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjustments_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)
